title: IoT Topic Payload
description: Schema for IoT Topic Payload data format used in AWS IoT FleetWise

campaignName.description: Name of the campaign that generated this data

vehicleName.description: Name of the vehicle that generated this data

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event (unsigned integer)

collectionEventTime.description: Timestamp when the data was collected (epoch time in milliseconds)

signals.description: Map of signal names to their collected data points

value.description: The value of the signal, can be of any type

dataType.description: The data type of the value

time.description: Timestamp when this specific signal value was collected (epoch time in milliseconds)
